meaning: n.闪米族的神,造成牺牲的可怖事物,蜥蜴之一种
examples: Moloch whose love is endless oil and stone!
Afortiori the influence of Moloch made them become sullen.
Moloch whose breast is a cannibal dynamo! Moloch whose ear is a smoking tomb!
Bukovksy fears that if we do not stop the European moloch from expanding the same thing might happen in Europe.
